message:
fix: batch wisp deletes in DeleteIssues to reduce Dolt commit pressure (bd-2ehd)

Previously, DeleteIssues deleted wisps one-by-one, each in its own SQL
transaction. For bulk GC operations (e.g., deleting 11k+ wisps), this
created per-delete transaction overhead. Replace the per-wisp loop with
deleteWispBatch() which processes all wisp deletes in a single transaction,
using IN-clause batches of 200 to avoid oversized queries.

Note: --no-verify used because pre-commit golangci-lint hook panics on
go1.26 (cached binary built with go1.25). Filed bd-66nc. Local golangci-lint
v2.8.0 reports 0 issues.
